title: PipelineEventV2
description: Authoritative normalized event for the transition_log.jsonl stream (v2 dataset contract). Each line in the JSONL file must validate against this schema.

event_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this event.

event_seq.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number within the trace.

phase.description: Pipeline phase this event occurred in.

event_type.description: Canonical event type. Controllable actions: propose_relation, add_hidden_assumption, request_recheck, select_formalization, finalize_profile, propose_promotion. Automatic consequences: profile_recomputed, propagation_applied, gate_updated, audit_completed.

event_class.description: Whether this event is a controllable agent/user action or an automatic system consequence.

actor.description: The actor role that initiated or owns this event.

cause_event_id.description: For automatic_consequence events: the event_id of the controllable action that caused this consequence. Null for controllable_action events.

before_hash.description: Hash of the relevant state before this event.

after_hash.description: Hash of the relevant state after this event.

changed_ids.description: IDs of claims, relations, or other entities modified by this event.

proposal.description: Structured proposal payload, if this event proposes a change.

accepted.description: Whether the proposal was accepted. Null if no proposal was made.

reject_reason.description: Required when accepted=false. Reason for rejection.

verifier_delta.description: Structured verifier state changes caused by this event.

cause_event_id.description: Must be a non-null event_id when event_class is automatic_consequence.

reject_reason.description: Must be a non-null string when accepted is false.

id.description: Stable identifier. Must be non-empty and safe for use as map keys.

eventClass.description: controllable_action: agent/user decision point (policy head target). automatic_consequence: deterministic system response (environment/verifier responsibility).

unavailableReason.description: Why an optional payload is absent.

legality.description: Whether the action was legal per state machine rules.

hidden_assumptions_added.description: Hidden assumptions surfaced by this event.

profile_recomputed.description: Whether the assurance profile was recomputed.

unavailable_reason.description: Why the verifier delta is partially or fully unavailable.

verifierDelta.description: Structured record of verifier/environment state changes caused by this event.
